final_answer: The action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action, and policy requires exact source closure before execution. The unresolved SLA breach record and credit cap keep the boundary open, so escalation is required before any customer-facing credit action.
open_blockers: SLA breach record and credit cap
